subject: Project pulse: rollout execution in Canberra | Albert Einstein | Q1 review | INIT-4545
body: Following yesterday's call, the rollout effort in Canberra needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Validate staffing, budget assumptions, and handoff checkpoints. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Albert Einstein and Marie Curie. Reference initiative INIT-4545. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: risk, quality.
